overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character exploring an abandoned lumber mill at night. The character walks from an open dirt path into increasingly cluttered and blood-soaked areas beneath wooden structures, eventually climbing to an upper walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: open approach to abandoned lumber mill

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path toward the main lumber mill buildings, weapon visible on back

entered.detail: tall cylindrical wooden water tower with conical roof
large red wooden industrial building with multiple levels and weathered paint
unpaved dirt and gravel path with sparse grass patches
weathered wooden fence lining the path
tall pole-mounted industrial floodlights illuminating the area

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt path toward an abandoned lumber mill complex at night. Industrial floodlights cast long shadows across the ground, illuminating the red wooden buildings ahead and a tall water tower to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: cluttered ground level beneath lumber mill structures

events.description: moving from open dirt path into enclosed area beneath wooden structures with blood-stained ground

agents.ego_description: navigating through cluttered debris and muddy ground beneath the main building, avoiding wooden obstacles

entered.detail: thick timber posts supporting the overhead structure
dark muddy earth mixed with debris and blood stains
large dark red blood stains pooling on the ground
piles of cut timber logs stacked against the building

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the open path into a cluttered, semi-enclosed area beneath the lumber mill. The ground becomes muddy and blood-stained, with wooden support beams overhead and stacks of logs visible to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage beneath lumber mill with blood-stained floors

events.description: entering narrow wooden passage under the main structure with extensive blood trails
approaching wooden stairs leading to upper level

agents.ego_description: walking carefully through a narrow wooden corridor covered in blood, emerging toward an open area with stairs

entered.detail: confined walkway with wooden walls and roof, heavily stained with blood
large cylindrical metal storage tanks visible in the background
steep wooden staircase leading up to the main platform

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow, dark wooden passage with blood-stained floors, then emerges into a more open area beneath the mill. Large industrial tanks are visible in the distance as the character approaches a wooden staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper wooden walkway of lumber mill

events.description: ascending wooden stairs to upper platform level

agents.ego_description: climbing wooden stairs to the upper walkway, then walking along the elevated platform

entered.detail: elevated wooden walkway with weathered planks and railings
abandoned green and rust-colored rail car or tanker

segments.scene_description: The character climbs the wooden stairs to an upper platform, revealing a rusted train car on the right. The red lumber mill building is now at eye level to the left as the character walks along the elevated wooden walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open industrial exterior into the claustrophobic, blood-stained depths of a lumber mill before ascending to an elevated vantage point. It begins on a dirt path at night, where industrial floodlights cast long shadows across red wooden buildings and a towering water tower. As the character moves forward, the open air gives way to a cluttered, semi-enclosed space beneath the mill, where the ground shifts to mud and blood under heavy wooden support beams and stacks of logs. The scene then tightens into a narrow, dark wooden passage before opening up again to reveal distant industrial tanks and a wooden staircase. Finally, the camera climbs the stairs to an upper platform, passing a rusted train car as the red mill buildings come into eye level along an elevated wooden walkway.
